name: Microwave Italian-Style Pot Roast
recipeIngredient: 3 lb Beef chuck pot roast, cut
3 medium Potatoes, peeled and cut into 1-inch cubes
3 medium Carrots, cut into julienne strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim excess fat from the pot roast. In a 3-quart casserole dish, stir together Worcestershire sauce, beef bouillon granules, sugar, oregano, garlic, ½ cup water, ½ teaspoon salt, and ¼ teaspoon pepper.
2. Add the pot roast to the mixture in the casserole dish. Cook, covered, on high (100%) power for about 5 minutes or until boiling. Then cook covered on medium (50%) power for 35 more minutes.
3. Turn the pot roast over. Add potatoes, carrots, celery, and onions. Cook meat and vegetables, covered, on medium heat for 25 to 40 minutes, or until tender. Spoon liquid over the meat and vegetables once or twice during cooking.
4. Transfer meat and vegetables to a serving platter, reserving the liquid in the casserole dish.
5. For gravy, skim fat from the reserved liquid. Stir together tomato sauce and flour. Stir in the tomato mixture and mushrooms into the liquid in the casserole dish. Cook uncovered on high for 5 to 10 minutes or until thickened and bubbly, stirring each minute once it starts to thicken, then every 30 seconds.
6. Serve gravy with meat and vegetables.
Makes 8 servings
Source: Better Homes and Gardens Microwave Cooking Card Library
